series_metadata.series_title: Mine Safety Inspection Reports and Orders
series_metadata.series_description: Safety inspection reports and order ceasing operations for violations or hazardous conditions completed by all Mine Safety Inspectors for all types of mining sites, underground, surface, etc., pursuant to R.C. Chapter 1561. Reports document inspections for new mining areas, roof control, all aspects of a mine that could affect the health and safety of persons and the protection and conservation of property within, about, or in connection with mines, mining, and quarries.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 50 years after all mining activities have ceased on the mine site. If scanned and saved in an electronic format the paper copy will be sent to the State Archivist for review. ; Electronic: Electronic records will be maintained permanently., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Permanent
